title: Skyborn Piglins
description: Adds Piglins that ride on Ghasts in the Nether!
body:
**Skyborn Piglin** is a chaotic addition to the Nether, introducing Piglins that ride on Ghasts. These skyborne enemies are equipped with Dispensers loaded with TNT, firing explosions down upon players. The Ghast itself retains its usual attack but fires at a much faster rate. There’s a configurable chance that any naturally spawned Ghast in the Nether will be replaced by a Piglin Ghast. The Piglins hanging on the ladders drop down when the Ghast is low enough to attack the player head on!


You can configure the probability of a Ghast being a Piglin Ghast with the gamerule "piglinGhastSpawnProbability" with a configurable value ranging from 0% to 100% chance.

The mod can be put on any modpack, both for personal and commercial use
The mod is made with MCreator
